headline: Air Products Membrane Solutions Holds Ribbon-Cutting Event for $70 Million Expansion of its Missouri Manufacturing and Logistics Center
summary: Air Products (NYSE:APD), the global leader in the production of gas separation and purification membranes, today hosted a ribbon-cutting celebration at the new $70 million expansion of its Missouri Manufacturing and Logistics Center in Maryland Heights, near St. Louis, Missouri.

headline: IAMGOLD Expands Cote Gold Resource Base With Updated Estimate
summary: IAG's updated Cote Gold estimate lifts Measured and Indicated resources 12% to 20.3M ounces as it advances an expansion study due in 2026.
